reviews.comment:
Desastre!!
El gasoil más caro de Colón !!!!
Pareciera que te castigan por ser socio del ACA y pésimo servicio

(Translated by Google)
Disaster!!
The most expensive diesel in Colón!!!!
It seems like they're punishing you for being an ACA member, and the service is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKczRqTXdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Los playeros y empleados excelentes. Pasamos la noche con nuestro camper. Baños muy limpios. Lo super recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The beach attendants and staff were great. We spent the night in our camper. The restrooms were very clean. I highly recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Bien, un poco oculta la entrada ya que delante hay una action. No un lugar para sentarse a tomar un café. Por ser el ACA tendría que tener más baños para mujeres.

(Translated by Google)
Okay, the entrance is a bit hidden since there's an action shop in front. Not a place to sit and have a coffee. Being the ACA, it should have more restrooms for women.

reviewReply.comment: Hola! Cómo estás? Muchas gracias. Trabajamos día a día para mejorar nuestro servicio. Muchas gracias por tu reseña, es de suma importancia para nosotros. Saludos!
